name: accessibility
description: Building a web project with accessibility in mind from the very start is crucial, especially in contexts (like AI-driven development) where manual testing by humans is limited. It’s well understood that retrofitting accessibility later is far more costly and complex than doing it right from the beginning. Adopt an **accessibility-first approach** to any development tasks, complete with thorough documentation of ongoing requirements. Ensure that accessibility standards beyond what is described in
author: pohlai88
